_description: SAMPLE — Evidence file template for search-demand gate. Copy this and fill in for any new SEO page or title change. All fields are required.
evidenceSource: GSC query data (494 impressions over 28 days, position 41.3, CTR 0%)
serpIntent: Calculator — users want to input loan amount, rate, term and get monthly payment, amortization
competitorWeakness: Bankrate (strong brand, position 1), NerdWallet (strong, position 2). But positions 5-10 are weaker generic calculators with thin content. QFINHUB can compete with interactive calculator + SEO content.
pageTypeDecision: parent calculator — improve existing /calculators/mortgage-calculator title and meta description

titleMetaDecision.title: Mortgage Calculator — Estimate Monthly Payment, Interest & Amortization
titleMetaDecision.ogTitle: Mortgage Calculator — Estimate Monthly Payment, Interest & Amortization
titleMetaDecision.metaDesc: See your exact monthly mortgage payment in seconds — principal, interest, taxes & insurance included. Compare 15 vs 30-year terms. Free instant results, no signup.
titleMetaDecision.rationale: Title describes what the calculator DOES (function), not example results. Creates click intent without giving away the answer.

improveExistingPageCheck.action: IMPROVE_EXISTING — title and meta optimization only
